name: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc.
summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. is a global hospitality company that operates, manages, and franchises hotels and resorts. The company offers lodging across multiple brand tiers, from luxury to economy, under brands such as Hilton Hotels & Resorts, Waldorf Astoria, Conrad, DoubleTree, Hampton Inn, and others. Hilton generates revenue through hotel management fees, franchise fees, and owned/leased property operations worldwide.

products.name: Hilton Hotels & Resorts
products.description: Full-service hotel brand offering upscale accommodations globally.

products.name: Waldorf Astoria Hotels & Resorts
products.description: Luxury hotel and resort brand under Hilton's portfolio.

products.name: Conrad Hotels & Resorts
products.description: Luxury lifestyle hotel brand within Hilton's portfolio.

products.name: Hampton by Hilton
products.description: Mid-scale hotel brand focused on consistent, affordable stays.
